heading: Overview of
Salesforce Certification Course
overViewOfOnline.subHeading: Become a Salesforce Expert with Industry-Ready Skills!
overViewOfOnline.description: The Salesforce Certification Course at Teksversity is a comprehensive training program designed to help learners master the world’s leading CRM platform. You’ll gain in-depth knowledge of sales, service, and marketing clouds, while also developing the skills to automate business processes, manage customer data, and build efficient solutions using Salesforce tools.
keyPoints: Understand Salesforce architecture, automation, and integration.
Configure Salesforce for sales, service, and marketing functions.
Build and custhomize Salesforce applications with Apex and Lightning.
Manage reports, dashboards, and workflow automation.
Prepare for Salesforce certification exams (Associate & Developer levels).

heading: Why choose
Salesforce Certification at Teksversity?
title: 13 Years of
Legacy
(Commitment, Growth, Success)
whyOnline.initialDescription: At Teksversity, we focus on transforming learners into job-ready professionals through hands-on practice and expert mentorship. The Salesforce Certification Course aligns with global Salesforce standards, offering complete learning from CRM fundamentals to advanced app development.

description.firstDescription: Teksversity goes beyond traditional lectures by providing real business simulations, Salesforce org setup, and live projects under certified mentors. Each learner receives personalized guidance, ensuring theoretical knowledge is effectively applied to real-world CRM scenarios.

description.secondDescription: In addition, Teksversity supports career growth with resume building, mock interviews, and placement assistance. Learners gain opportunities to connect with leading IT and CRM companies, preparing them for successful, industry-ready careers.

keyPoints: Covers Salesforce Administration and Development tracks.
Includes Sales, Service, and Marketing Cloud modules.
Focuses on data management, automation, and analytics.
Prepares you for Salesforce certification exams.
Access live Salesforce environments for practice.
Perform end-to-end CRM automation exercises.
Real-time projects like lead tracking and sales pipeline management.
Data analytics and reporting within Salesforce for actionable insights.
Learn directly from Salesforce-certified professionals.
Get personalized mentor feedback and project reviews.
Stay updated with the latest Salesforce Lightning and AI tools.
Participate in Q&A sessions and interactive workshops.
Resume building and interview coaching.
Real-time case study discussions and mock interviews.
Placement assistance with top tech and consulting firms.
Receive guidance on professional networking and career growth strategies.

hiringPartners.hiringPartnersSubheading: Get ready to grab your dream job! Join the talent pool with access to the world's best hiring companies.

faq.question: What specific Salesforce career path does this course prepare me for?
faq.answer: This course is designed to cover key components of the Salesforce ecosystem, primarily preparing you for the Salesforce Administrator (ADM 201) and Salesforce Platform Developer I (PDI) certification exams, which are the most common entry points into the Salesforce ecosystem.

faq.question: Are there any prerequisites for enrolling in the Salesforce course?
faq.answer: To enroll, you should have a basic understanding of computer usage. For the developer modules (like Apex), a fundamental knowledge of OOPS (Object-Oriented Programming) concepts is beneficial but not strictly mandatory, as the course covers the essentials.

faq.question: Does the Teksversity training include hands-on access to the Salesforce platform?
faq.answer: Yes, the training is 100% practical. We provide guidance on how to set up and utilize a free Salesforce Developer Edition Org for hands-on practice, ensuring you work on real-world scenarios throughout the course.

faq.question: What is the mode of training, and is it live or self-paced?
faq.answer: Teksversity offers a hybrid model, combining comprehensive, self-paced video lectures and materials with scheduled live online classes for interactive doubt-clearing, real-time project discussions, and expert Q&A sessions.

faq.question: Will the course cover both Salesforce Classic and the new Lightning Experience?
faq.answer: The primary focus is on Salesforce Lightning Experience, which is the current industry standard. However, key differences and migration concepts from Classic are also covered to ensure a well-rounded skill set.

faq.question: Does the curriculum include Salesforce development tools like Apex and Visualforce/LWC?
faq.answer: Yes, the curriculum is divided into Admin modules (clicks) and Developer modules (code), which include in-depth training on Apex programming, Visualforce, and the modern Lightning Web Components (LWC).

faq.question: How often is the course content updated?
faq.answer: Salesforce releases major updates three times a year. Our course content is reviewed and updated after every major release to ensure you are learning the most current features, best practices, and security protocols.

faq.question: Will the Teksversity certificate help me get a job?
faq.answer: Our certificate validates your completion of an industry-aligned, hands-on curriculum. Coupled with our dedicated job assistance (resume building, mock interviews), this certification significantly enhances your profile for Salesforce roles.

faq.question: Is coding required to become a Salesforce Administrator?
faq.answer: No. The Administrator role focuses on configuration (clicks, not code), such as setting up users, security, and automation. Coding is only required if you pursue the Developer track.

faq.question: What kind of projects will I complete in this course?
faq.answer: You will complete at least two comprehensive, real-time projects covering both Administration and Development, such as building a complete Sales or Service Cloud application from scratch for a fictional company.
